name: lexora-api-test-project
description: Generated Postman/Newman API automation suite for Lexora.

scripts.test:staging: newman run postman/lexora-api-tests.postman_collection.json -e postman/staging.postman_environment.json --reporters cli,json,htmlextra --reporter-json-export reports/results.json --reporter-htmlextra-export reports/report.html
